Public references and source notes

Recognition should be traceable.

PALO is an open framework. This page distinguishes primary implementation sources from independent public references and records the date on which links were reviewed.

Links reviewed on 11 July 2026

Public references

The following sources provide public context about PALO and its creator. They retain their own editorial responsibility; inclusion here does not imply endorsement or replace the framework documentation.

World AI Council

A public World AI Council post refers to PALO and notes recognition through Reuters coverage.

Read the public reference

Rivista AI

Rivista AI covered the P.A.L.O. Framework Toolbox 2.0 in the context of governance and the Human Economic Forum.

Read the article

Rivista Corporate Governance

The 2026 special issue index includes a reference to "The PALO Framework for AI Corporate Governance."

Open the special issue index

Human Economic Forum

The Human Economic Forum 2025 programme lists Fabrizio Degni as creator of the PALO Framework.

Open the programme

Primary sources

For the method, controls, interactive tools, and release history, these are the authoritative PALO sources.

Source of truth. The open repository and framework documents describe the implementation. Regulatory links should always be checked against the official source because guidance and application dates can change.

  • PALO Framework GitHub repository
  • PALO-AM Agentic Governance Modality
  • Risk Tiering Calculator and FRIA Assessment
  • European Commission AI Act information

Verification note

PALO is an educational, governance-support, and pre-screening toolkit. It does not certify compliance or provide legal advice. Each assessment must be reviewed against the applicable law, sector requirements, and deployment context.

Related ecosystem

PolicyWatcher is a separate civic-tech portal by Fabrizio Degni. It monitors public privacy policies and terms of service and provides a complementary operational view for policy change, evidence traceability, and source quality.

PolicyWatcher

Use PolicyWatcher as an external monitoring companion for public policy changes. It is not a PALO module or a legal certification service.

Open PolicyWatcher

Methodology and trust

Review the portal's confidence methodology and public Trust & Quality materials before using an AI-assisted policy signal in a governance record.

Read the methodology | Open Trust & Quality
